title: Instagram Comment Scraper (Python)
description: Scrape comments and full-page screenshots with a red outline around each comment.

urls.title: Post URLs
urls.description: List of public Instagram post URLs.

maxComments.title: Max comments
maxComments.description: Optional limit. Set 0 to scrape all comments.

loginEnabled.title: Enable login
loginEnabled.description: Enable Instagram login (recommended for more comments).

loginStateKey.title: Login state key
loginStateKey.description: Key in KV store for saved Playwright storage state.

saveLoginState.title: Save login state
saveLoginState.description: Persist Playwright storage state after login.

headful.title: Headful browser
headful.description: Run browser in headful mode (useful for debugging).

slowMoMs.title: Slow motion (ms)
slowMoMs.description: Delay Playwright operations by N ms.

maxUiRounds.title: Max UI rounds
maxUiRounds.description: Max load-more/scroll rounds for UI mode.

uiIdleRounds.title: UI idle rounds
uiIdleRounds.description: Stop after this many rounds without new comments.

loadTimeoutSecs.title: Load timeout (seconds)
loadTimeoutSecs.description: Max time for loading all comments.
